reasons: Lolita can block Harley's projectile-based follow-up damage and reduce his ability to burst protected backline targets.
Her shield is especially useful when Harley marks a marksman or mage behind the frontline.

proof.summary: Harley relies on projectile follow-up after blinking in, while Lolita can block incoming ranged basic attacks and projectiles for protected allies.
worksBestWhen: Lolita protects the teammate Harley marks with Deadly Magic.
failureCases: Harley attacks from an angle outside Lolita's shield.
Harley waits until Guardian's Bulwark is unavailable.

reasons: Kaja can punish Harley after Space Escape is used by suppressing and dragging him into teammate damage.
Suppression is valuable because Harley depends on fast movement and timing to escape after burst.

proof.summary: Harley wants to blink in and return to safety, while Kaja can suppress and drag him before he finishes the burst-and-return cycle.
worksBestWhen: Kaja waits for Harley to commit Space Escape.
Kaja or his team tracks Harley's return location.
failureCases: Harley pokes from max range and never enters Kaja's threat range.
Kaja uses Divine Judgment before Harley commits.

reasons: Franco can catch Harley's predictable return path or suppress him after Harley commits.
This counter is strongest when Franco has vision of Harley's hat position.

proof.summary: Harley depends on Space Escape to leave after burst, while Franco can punish the entry or return timing with hook pressure and suppression.
worksBestWhen: Franco holds suppression for Harley's committed engage.
failureCases: Harley keeps distance and baits Franco's hook.
Harley returns before Franco can reach him.

reasons: Eudora can punish Harley when his blink is unavailable or when he returns predictably to his hat.
Her targeted stun makes Harley's squishy burst pattern risky if he mispositions.

proof.summary: Harley is most vulnerable after using Space Escape, and Eudora can punish that small window with targeted stun and burst.
worksBestWhen: Eudora waits near the expected return path.
Harley has already used Space Escape.
failureCases: Harley avoids entering Eudora's cast range.

reasons: Saber can punish Harley as a fragile assassin-mage with targeted airborne burst.
This is strongest when Harley has already used Space Escape or lacks Purify.

proof.summary: Harley relies on mobility to escape, while Saber can target-lock, knock airborne, and burst him during a committed window.
worksBestWhen: Saber waits until Harley's blink route is known.
Harley has already used Space Escape aggressively.
failureCases: Harley keeps enough distance to avoid Saber's engage.
